Vendored from google/adk-web.

- Repository: https://github.com/google/adk-web
- License: Apache License 2.0, see `LICENSE`
- Source files: `styles.scss`, `_theme-colors.scss`
- Runtime bridge: `adk-web-bridge.css`

`adk-web-bridge.css` adapts the upstream Angular Material custom properties for
this Django admin without loading Angular or compiling SCSS at request time.
